s1-halftone-carrier.passes: HalftoneCarrier.frag → WGSL pass + applyHalftoneOnSurface adapter; halftoneEffect.ts switched; gpuHalftoneCarrier.ts deleted; pnpm tsc clean; pnpm vitest run 682/682; smoke harness scripts/gpu-smoke/halftone.html landed (9 scenarios across mono/cmyk/rgb × shape/invert/bg-opacity); real-GPU run pending on user hardware

s2-channel-drift.passes: ChannelDrift.frag → WGSL pass + applyChannelDriftOnSurface adapter; signalDamageExecution.ts switched; gpuSignalDamage.ts + shaders/ChannelDrift.frag deleted; channelDrift program entry pruned from ProgramRegistry + renderChannelDriftComposite removed from PipelineRenderer; pnpm tsc clean; pnpm vitest run 682/682; smoke harness scripts/gpu-smoke/channelDrift.html landed (6 scenarios across pos/neg/asymmetric/diagonal/zero-intensity/zero-offset); real-GPU run pending on user hardware

s3-effect-filter2d.passes: Filter2dAdjust.frag → WGSL pass; effectExecution.ts and stageMaskComposite.ts switched (using mask/maskedBlend); gpuFilter2dPostProcessing.ts and gpuMaskedCanvasBlend.ts deleted; pixel parity ≤ 2/255

s4-effect-mask.passes: effectMask.ts switched to existing mask/{linearGradient,radialGradient,brushStamp,rangeGate,maskInvert} passes; gpuLocalMaskShape.ts and gpuLocalMaskRangeGate.ts deleted; pixel parity ≤ 2/255 on linear/radial/brush/range fixtures

s5-overlay.passes: TimestampOverlay.frag → WGSL pass; overlayExecution.ts switched (canvas blend via mask/maskedBlend); gpuTimestampOverlay.ts and gpuCanvasLayerBlend.ts deleted; pixel parity ≤ 2/255 on timestamp/caption/watermark

s6-ascii-wiring.passes: ASCII composition pass extended to cover dual-layer (bg blur), dot mode, full-color/duotone, grid overlay; asciiEffect.ts wired to passes/carrier/ascii/ pipeline (descriptors→analysis→selection→composition); gpuAsciiCarrier.ts deleted; CPU tone computation removed from asciiEffect.ts; visual parity vs current production ASCII ≤ 4/255 on representative fixtures

s7-delete-legacy.passes: src/lib/renderer/ removed; twgl.js removed from package.json + lockfile; docs/decisions.md Backend note cleared; render-kernel-webgpu-rewrite s7 marked done and that task pair deleted; tsc/lint/vitest/dead-code all clean; no WebGL/twgl/.frag/.vert/.glsl references in src/
